faqs.q: What happens after my 10-day free trial?
faqs.a: Once your trial ends, you'll be prompted to choose a paid plan to continue. Your data stays safe and your settings are preserved — just pick a plan and carry on.

faqs.q: Do I need a credit card to start the trial?
faqs.a: No. You can start your 10-day free trial with just your name, email and phone — no payment details required until you're ready to subscribe.

faqs.q: What are Zara credits and how do they work?
faqs.a: Zara credits power every AI interaction — every order announcement, every question you ask her, every operation she runs. Each interaction consumes 1 credit. When you run out, you can top up anytime without waiting for renewal.

faqs.q: Can I switch plans after subscribing?
faqs.a: Yes, switch between plans anytime with no penalty. Your data and credits carry over.
Card, bank transfer, and USSD via Flutterwave.

faqs.q: What is HaaS (Hardware as a Service)?
faqs.a: Enterprise clients get physical hardware — an iPad and a smart speaker — so Zara can speak and listen in your restaurant physically, just like a real assistant on the floor.
WhatsApp or email us for enterprise solutions tailored to your business size and needs.

benefits.title: Full Intelligence
benefits.desc: Zara AI monitors every order, every table, every naira — in real time. She speaks, she listens, she never sleeps.

benefits.title: Zero Manual Work
benefits.desc: Automated reports, stock alerts, Telegram updates and order announcements — all running without lifting a finger.

benefits.title: Revenue Growth
benefits.desc: Menu optimization, peak hour insights, profit margin tracking and fast-rising product detection built right in.

benefits.title: Any Device, Anywhere
benefits.desc: Web dashboard, mobile app, iPad and smart speakers — Enflow runs your floor from every angle.

benefits.title: Customer First
benefits.desc: QR ordering, WhatsApp tab links, live delivery tracking and a seamless payment experience your customers will love.
